title: 2 Pcs Silicone Pastry Brush Set, Heat Resistant, Suitable for Barbecues, Pastries, Food Stirring, Baking Cooking
features: 【High Quality 】 The grill brush is made of high quality food grade silicone, the silicone head is soft and elastic, heat resistant and non-stick, it does not loosen, it is environmentally friendly environment.you can use it with confidence.
【Durable】 The integrated design of our kitchen brush can prevent removal,It will not separate or loosen from the handle.Very suitable for bakery and barbecue.
【Easy to Clean】 The pastry brush silicone can be easily cleaned with warm water or soapy water. After washing, they can be dried and used repeatedly.
【Widely Used】 Suitable for a variety of applications, can be used for cooking, baking, pastry, baking, cooking, sauce brushing,roast etc.

【After-sales Service】 Due to being multipurpose brush, they are essential in a kitchen. Ideal for baked goods and grills, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we will solve the problem for you within 12 hours.
description: Do you want an indispensable tool for baking, bread, butter or grilled food? 2 Pcs Pastry Brush Silicone, Cooking Baking Brush Set, Grill Brush, Heat Resistant Oil Brush Suit for Barbecues, Pastries, Food Stirring, Baking Cooking Food Grade Silicone Brush The barbecue brush is made of high quality food grade silicone, the silicone head is soft and elastic, heat resistant and non-stick. Easy to Clean The pastry brush silicone can be easily cleaned with warm water or soapy water, and the pastry brush and baking brush can also be cleaned in the dishwasher. After washing, they can be dried and used repeatedly. Durable The integrated design of our kitchen brush can prevent removal,It will not separate or loosen from the handle.Very suitable for bakery and barbecue. Versatility Suitable for a variety of applications, can be used in cooking, baking, pastry, baking, cooking, sauce brushing, suitable for all kinds of food, such as meat, cakes, pastries, oil-based marinades, multifunctional butter cookware , sauce, roast, etc.
